questions.question: A rectangle has a perimeter of 22 cm and an area of 24 sq cm. What are the dimensions? Show your work.
questions.answer: l+w=11. Factor pairs of 24 that add to 11: 8+3=11, 8×3=24 ✓. Length=8 cm, Width=3 cm.

questions.question: A rectangular pen has perimeter 18 ft. Which dimensions give the LEAST area?
questions.explanation: P=18 → l+w=9. 가장 길쭉한 8×1이 최소 넓이 8 sq ft.

questions.question: A 24 sq cm rug. Which dimensions need the LEAST trim around the edge?
questions.explanation: 6×4가 정사각에 가장 가까움 → P=20 cm 최소.

questions.question: Lily has 16 ft of fence AND wants 16 sq ft of garden. She thinks she can choose ONE rectangle that satisfies BOTH. Find such a rectangle if possible.
questions.answer: 4×4 정사각형 (P=16, A=16). 정사각형은 P와 A가 같은 단위 수치 가능 (변=4일 때).
